body:
# Release Notes — v1.17.4

## Fixes

### XYZ — Permissions restricted by an Organization policy are no longer flagged as missing

- If user AWS account is under an AWS Organizations service control policy (SCP) that limits where actions can run — for example a policy that restricts certain regions — those permissions were incorrectly reported as missing, showing "needs more access" even though you had granted them.
- They now show as **Partial** instead of denied: treated as working (no missing-permission banner), kept out of the "Grant access" flow, with an inline note explaining that an Organization policy — not a missing IAM permission — is restricting the action.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/XYZ/XYZ/compare/v1.17.3...v1.17.4
